activities_projects.title: Identify Consumer Rights Poster
activities_projects.objective: To understand the basic consumer rights.
steps: List the six consumer rights from the textbook.
Create a colorful poster explaining each right in one line.
Display the poster in the classroom.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognize and recall basic consumer rights.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check correctness of rights listed and clarity of explanation.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Awareness Role Play
activities_projects.objective: To understand how consumer rights work in real life.
steps: Assign roles of consumer and shopkeeper.
Act out a situation involving defective goods.
Discuss which consumer right is applied.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand practical use of consumer rights.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess participation and correct identification of rights.

activities_projects.title: Reading Product Labels Activity
activities_projects.objective: To learn importance of checking product information.
steps: Bring empty product packages from home.
Identify MRP, expiry date, and manufacturer details.
Write why this information is important.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to check product details before buying.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check correct identification of product details.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Complaint Letter Writing
activities_projects.objective: To practice writing a simple complaint letter.
steps: Imagine buying a defective product.
Write a complaint letter to the shopkeeper.
Include details like bill number and issue.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how to file complaints.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess clarity, format, and relevance of complaint.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Court Fact Sheet
steps: Write short notes on district, state, and national consumer courts.
Mention one function of each.
Share in class.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the structure of consumer courts.

activities_projects.title: Advertisement Analysis Activity
steps: Select one advertisement.
Analyze claims made in the ad.
Discuss if it could mislead consumers.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness about false advertising.

activities_projects.title: Right to Information Chart
activities_projects.objective: To understand the importance of the right to information.
steps: Write examples where information is important before buying.
Explain how lack of information harms consumers.
Present chart in class.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand importance of product information.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check clarity and relevance of examples.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Problems List
steps: List five common problems faced by consumers.
Match each problem with a related consumer right.
Discuss solutions.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect problems with specific consumer rights.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Awareness Slogan Writing
activities_projects.objective: To promote awareness about consumer rights.
steps: Write three slogans about consumer awareness.
Select the best one.
Share with the class.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students creatively express importance of consumer rights.

activities_projects.title: Bill Collection Activity
activities_projects.objective: To understand the importance of keeping bills.
steps: Collect two purchase bills from home.
Identify details like GST, date, and amount.
Explain why bills are important for complaints.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand importance of proof of purchase.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check correct identification of bill details.
